message:
bd-2wds9: Verify types/budget.rs audit (SOUND)

Stale agent a14fa59 flagged delay_bound as HIGH severity bug.

Verification: FALSE POSITIVE
- Line 807 `let delay = found?;` correctly returns None on first failure
- Line 812 returns Some(worst_delay) only when ALL times satisfied
- This implements exactly the documented invariant:
  "arrival(t) <= service(t + d) for all t ∈ [0, horizon]"

Other findings (O(n²) convolution, dead CurveError fields) are documented
design choices or minor dead code, not correctness bugs.

Budget semiring algebra is correctly implemented with full lemma coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
